---
title: "requirements.txt"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-primprod.html)

Python dependencies for the MH1 primary productivity container.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.text}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-primprod/config/requirements.txt >}}
```

:::
